# opnsense_openvpn_instance (Resource)

OpenVPN instances (servers or clients) configured under `VPN > OpenVPN > Instances`. Each instance corresponds to one OpenVPN daemon process on the OPNsense host.

## Example Usage

```terraform
// A minimal OpenVPN server instance authenticating against the Local Database.
resource "opnsense_openvpn_instance" "server" {
  description = "example-server"
  vpn_id      = 2001

  role     = "server"
  dev_type = "tun"
  protocol = "udp"
  topology = "subnet"

  server                  = "10.10.20.0/24"
  port                    = 1194
  verify_client_cert      = "none"
  username_as_common_name = true
  auth_mode               = ["Local Database"]

  push_route = ["192.168.1.0/24"]
}

// An OpenVPN client instance dialing a remote server.
resource "opnsense_openvpn_instance" "client" {
  description = "example-client"
  vpn_id      = 2002

  role     = "client"
  dev_type = "tun"
  protocol = "udp"

  remote                = ["vpn.example.com:1194"]
  verify_client_cert    = "none"
  remote_cert_tls       = true
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `auth_digest` (String) Authentication digest. Set to `""` to use the OpenVPN default. Valid values include `SHA1`, `SHA256`, `SHA512`, etc. Defaults to `""`.
- `auth_gen_token` (Number) Generate auth tokens valid for this many seconds. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `auth_gen_token_renewal` (Number) Renew the auth token every N seconds. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `auth_gen_token_secret` (String, Sensitive) Secret used to sign auth tokens. Defaults to `""`.
- `auth_mode` (Set of String) Authentication backends (e.g. `["Local Database"]`). Defaults to `[]`.
- `bridge_gateway` (String) Bridge gateway IP when bridging the OpenVPN tap interface. Defaults to `""`.
- `bridge_pool` (String) Bridge DHCP pool range when bridging the OpenVPN tap interface (`start-end`). Defaults to `""`.
- `carp_depend_on` (String) Only run this instance when the named CARP VIP is master. Defaults to `""`.
- `cert_depth` (String) Maximum certificate chain depth. One of `""` (do not check), `1`, `2`, `3`, `4`, `5`. Defaults to `""`.
- `certificate` (String) ID (refid) of the server/client certificate to use. Defaults to `""`.
- `certificate_authority` (String) ID (refid) of the certificate authority. Leave blank to derive from the server/client certificate. Defaults to `""`.
- `compress_migrate` (Boolean) Enable compression migration (legacy clients). Defaults to `false`.
- `crl` (String) ID (refid) of the certificate revocation list. Defaults to `""`.
- `data_ciphers` (Set of String) Accepted data-channel ciphers, in priority order (e.g. `["AES-256-GCM", "CHACHA20-POLY1305"]`). Defaults to `[]`.
- `data_ciphers_fallback` (String) Fallback cipher for legacy clients that don't support cipher negotiation. Defaults to `""`.
- `description` (String) Description of this instance. Defaults to `""`.
- `dev_type` (String) Tunnel device type. One of `tun`, `tap`, or `ovpn` (DCO). Defaults to `tun`.
- `dns_domain` (Set of String) DNS domains pushed to clients. Defaults to `[]`.
- `dns_domain_search` (Set of String) DNS search domains pushed to clients. Defaults to `[]`.
- `dns_servers` (Set of String) DNS servers pushed to clients. Defaults to `[]`.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Enable this instance. Defaults to `true`.
- `fragment` (Number) Enable internal datagram fragmentation. Defaults to `-1` (disabled).
- `http_proxy` (String) Connect through an HTTP proxy (`host:port`). Defaults to `""`.
- `ifconfig_pool_persist` (Boolean) Persist client-IP assignments across restarts. Defaults to `false`.
- `keepalive_interval` (Number) Keepalive ping interval in seconds. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `keepalive_timeout` (Number) Keepalive timeout in seconds (peer is declared dead). Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `local` (String) Local IP to bind to. Defaults to `""` (all interfaces).
- `local_group` (String) Required local group membership for authenticating clients. Defaults to `""`.
- `max_clients` (Number) Maximum number of concurrent clients. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `mss_fix` (Boolean) Enable `mssfix` to clamp TCP MSS to the tunnel MTU. Defaults to `false`.
- `no_pool` (Boolean) When `true`, disables the dynamic IP pool. Defaults to `false`.
- `ntp_servers` (Set of String) NTP servers pushed to clients. Defaults to `[]`.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Client mode: password for the remote server. Defaults to `""`.
- `port` (Number) Listening port (server) or remote port (client). Defaults to `-1` (no fixed port).
- `port_share` (String) Share the OpenVPN port with another service using `host:port`. Defaults to `""`.
- `protocol` (String) Network protocol. One of `udp`, `udp4`, `udp6`, `tcp`, `tcp4`, `tcp6`. Defaults to `udp`.
- `provision_exclusive` (Boolean) Only allow the most recently authenticated session for a given common name. Defaults to `false`.
- `push_excluded_routes` (Set of String) Routes excluded from being pushed to clients (CIDR). Defaults to `[]`.
- `push_inactive` (Number) Disconnect clients after this many seconds of inactivity. Defaults to `-1` (disabled).
- `push_route` (Set of String) Routes to push to clients (CIDR). Defaults to `[]`.
- `redirect_gateway` (Set of String) OpenVPN `redirect-gateway` flags. Any of `local`, `autolocal`, `def1`, `bypass-dhcp`, `bypass-dns`, `block-local`, `ipv6`, `!ipv4`. Defaults to `[]`.
- `register_dns` (Boolean) Run `register-dns` on Windows clients. Defaults to `false`.
- `remote` (Set of String) Remote host(s) the client should connect to. Use `host` or `host:port`. Defaults to `[]`.
- `remote_cert_tls` (Boolean) Require the remote peer to have a certificate with the correct extended key usage. Defaults to `false`.
- `reneg_sec` (Number) Renegotiate the data channel key after this many seconds. `0` disables renegotiation. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `role` (String) Whether this instance acts as a `server` or a `client`. Defaults to `server`.
- `route` (Set of String) Local routes to install (CIDR). Defaults to `[]`.
- `route_metric` (Number) Metric for installed routes. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `server` (String) IPv4 tunnel network in CIDR notation (server mode). Defaults to `""`.
- `server_ipv6` (String) IPv6 tunnel network in CIDR notation (server mode). Defaults to `""`.
- `strict_user_cn` (String) Whether to enforce that the username matches the certificate common name. One of `0` (no), `1` (yes), or `2` (yes, case-insensitive). Defaults to `0`.
- `tls_key` (String) UUID of an `opnsense_openvpn_static_key` to use as TLS key. Defaults to `""`.
- `topology` (String) Tunnel topology. One of `subnet`, `net30`, or `p2p`. Defaults to `subnet`.
- `tun_mtu` (Number) MTU for the tunnel interface. Defaults to `-1` (unset).
- `use_ocsp` (Boolean) Use OCSP to verify the peer certificate. Defaults to `false`.
- `username` (String) Client mode: username for the remote server. Defaults to `""`.
- `username_as_common_name` (Boolean) Use the authenticated username as the common name. Defaults to `false`.
- `various_flags` (Set of String) Miscellaneous instance flags. Any of `block-ipv6`, `client-to-client`, `duplicate-cn`, `float`, `passtos`, `persist-remote-ip`, `remote-random`, `route-noexec`, `route-nopull`, `explicit-exit-notify`, `fast-io`. Defaults to `[]`.
- `various_push_flags` (Set of String) Miscellaneous push flags. Any of `block-ipv6`, `block-outside-dns`, `register-dns`, `explicit-exit-notify`. Defaults to `[]`.
- `verify_client_cert` (String) Client certificate verification mode. One of `require` or `none`. Defaults to `require`.
- `verify_x509_name` (String) Verify the peer certificate against this X509 name. Defaults to `""`.
- `vpn_id` (Number) Numeric VPN ID. Must be unique across all OpenVPN instances. The OPNsense web UI auto-assigns one; when managing instances via Terraform you should set this explicitly to keep ordering deterministic. Defaults to `-1` (auto).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID of the instance.
